name: Dry Goods store
description: I'm in a Dry Goods store
hints: The Dry-Goods store! Essential supplies here: shovel, matches, compass. READ SIGN!
GET SHOV, GET MATC, GET COMP. The sign tells you this is the treasure room.
READ SIGN says to leave treasures here and SAY SCORE. This is THE treasure room!
Take the supplies you need. Drop all 13 treasures here and SCOR to win. N=town (2).
notes: THE TREASURE ROOM. Dry-Goods store with essential supplies (shovel, matches, compass). Drop all 13 treasures and SCORE. N=town (2).
